# Batch guide

## Standard 10-video batch

```text
4 feed-native attention/retention tests
2 search-native evergreen tutorials
1 sendable identity/social video
1 saveable checklist/template
1 proof/authority teardown
1 experimental wildcard
```

## Required metadata

Each video must have:

```text
hypothesis ID
scientific-style name
experiment ID
primary signal
metric code
method code
variant code
checkpoint schedule
decision rule
```

## Weekly allocation

```text
60% proven mechanisms
30% structured exploration
10% wildcards
```

## Batch review

```text
Sort by primary metric.
Sort by utility score.
Sort by follow conversion.
Sort by search durability.
Sort by trust risk.
```

## Batch decision

```text
1–2 mechanisms scale.
2–3 mechanisms replicate.
2–4 mechanisms rewrite.
The rest kill.
```
